metadata.description: Marketplace hosting craft. Staged in a personal repo; not yet listed on a public marketplace.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Opinionated engineering-discipline tooling for Copilot CLI. Four workflow skills forming a research -> experiment -> implement pipeline (plus decompose for structuring work), each behavior-validated before shipping; two stdio MCP servers on a shared git-backed storage adapter (craft-journal for resume continuity + BM25 findings reuse, craft-compose for roadmap->plan->item work composition); and a Node hook dispatcher (resume + work-tree injection, failure capture, cross-machine sync). Host-agnostic.
